generator: component-library-preparer (full re-scan 2026-06-22 — added prefix-free DS consumption layer)
purpose: Normalized source-of-truth inventory of the live UI library. Consumed by page-composer (only `ready`), build-pages, component-forge (gaps), forge-index (incremental refresh).
compose_mode_reason: Layout layer (sections/lab/_layout.tsx) does not exist; atoms-and-layouts composition is blocked until forged. page-composer must use whole Lab* sections.

consumption_api.summary: Prefix-free design-system barrel is the CANONICAL import surface. Lab*/_kit are the internal implementation — the barrel re-exports them (identical render). Import clean names from the barrel; reach for raw Lab* only for archetypes not yet aliased.
consumption_api.import: import { StatementHero, Bento, FullStatement, Gallery, PinnedSteps, Eyebrow, Title, Media, Button } from "@/components/ds";
consumption_api.page_container_reason: section-lab = base .lab-* rules (required); ds = light design-system language (tokens + lens-soft cards + atmosphere), gated on :not(.ink).
consumption_api.not_yet_aliased: The other ~11 Lab archetypes (Editorial split, SplitRing, HubMap, StatBand, Numbered, RiskControl, QuietCta, Pricing, CompareTable, Faq, Statement) have NO clean alias yet — import them as Lab* directly until promoted into the barrel.

design_system_light.scope: .ds (globals.css, end of file); all rules gated on :not(.ink) so surface=ink keeps the native dark look
surfaces: branded --lens-deep media frame on light sections
design_system_light.overflow_guard: .band{overflow-x:clip} (+ .section-mist-bridge / .section-orange-glow) — removes page-level horizontal scroll from full-bleed children; clip (NOT hidden) so position:sticky pinned stages (.lab-process, .ds-cinema) keep working
design_system_light.docs: wiki/architecture/design-system.md §Reusable components (v1.4); cloud DS bundle .claude/designs/evallense + claude.ai/design project synced 2026-06-22

qa_2026_06_22.method: read-only HTTP render-check on running :3005 (preview tool blocked — user dev server owns the port)
qa_2026_06_22.note: Lab section geometry/API unchanged this scan → browser_qa from 2026-06-17 carries forward; overflow guard + --dsc-* verified in served source.

browser_qa.note: Full `pnpm build` not run (forbidden without explicit user permission); build status = dev-server-compiled-ok.

readiness_policy: A component is `ready` only when ALL hold: source+export exist, rendered in Section Lab, props parsed, versions+surfaces confirmed, browser QA run, build ok, light/dark ok, responsive ok, horizontal-overflow ok, media contract known, consumption contract complete. page-composer consumes ONLY `ready`; `conditional` requires an explicit fallback. ALSO: `ready` requires registration.status=completed and honest build evidence (`dev-compiled` != `passed`); a recipe is `ready` only when all member backgrounds/transitions/motion are themselves `ready` + registered.

L1_tokens.note: no z-index token group; spacing only --gutter/--maxw

L12_motion.note: 2 runtimes (ScrollFX, ScrollOrchestrator) + 6 visual-layer-forge motion recipes: static, slow-ambient-drift, glow-expansion, pattern-reveal, crossfade, nebula-drift(batch4 dark)

L13_backgrounds.note: 13 audited + 8 visual-layer-forge (batch 1) + 7 batch 4 dark themes: ink-floor-glow, nebula-layers, nebula-blob, glass-tinted, glass-plain, nebula-video-scrim, heading-lens-gradient. +7 dark tokens in :root (tokens_added_batch4).

L14_transitions.note: 5 audited + tr-gradient-bridge(per-direction) + 4 visual-layer-forge + tr-lens-seam(batch4 dark); + tr-overlap-bridge (blocked). BLUR/MIST seams DROPPED by user 2026-06-17.

L15_recipes.status: 7 composition recipes ready: calm-product, dense-evidence, trust-methodology, cinematic-break, quiet-conversion, dark-refined(batch4), dark-nebula(batch4). style_anchors: 3 light + 2 dark (style-dark-refined/style-dark-nebula ready).

summary.additional_sections: 3 non-archetype sections recorded in sections.json#additional_sections (ds-cinema [self-contained inline cinematic], LabCinemaScrim [prop-driven cinematic sibling], LabFullStatement [archetype-02 heading+sub variant, barrel FullStatement]) — all valid/intentional

batch 4 dark — dual radial blob, --pin driven

status.summary: starter library + batch 4 dark themes: 15 backgrounds + 8 transitions(+1 blocked) + 6 motion + 7 recipes + 2 dark style anchors — all ready + registered
status.scope: 6-8 bg / 6-8 transitions / 4-5 motion / recipes + dark-theme batch

backlog_blocked.note: designed, not implemented; page owns cross-section overlap
